strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience spanning web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure — meets the minimum experience threshold
Active work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq demonstrates hands-on, current engagement with agentic AI tooling
Founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive and the ability to ship and sustain a platform independently over multiple years
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field; educational background is a BS in CS and a Fine Arts degree
AI involvement is recent (2025) and staff-level in scope — no demonstrated history of AI strategy, platform leadership, or advising enterprise customers at scale
Role history reflects individual contributor and senior developer tracks; no evidence of director-level influence, external thought leadership, or shaping organizational AI strategy
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings broad engineering experience and genuine hands-on versatility across stacks and domains, and his recent MCP and agentic tooling work at re:cinq is directionally relevant. However, the role demands director-level strategic impact — advising enterprise customers, shaping AI product vision, and leading through influence — none of which is evidenced in his career history. His AI involvement is nascent and operational rather than strategic, and there is no demonstrated track record of the kind of recognized AI expertise, platform-scale delivery, or cross-organizational leadership the position requires.
